description: Dunzo is a conversational task assistant for capturing tasks, organizing projects, and managing lists through chat. Its public site presents a beta web app backed by an API host at api.itsdunzo.com.
summary: itsdunzo.com exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.itsdunzo.com/mcp for Dunzo task operations; no public REST/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found.
